mapper.select: /* adm-menu-userscreen-sql-oracle.xml - selectUserScreenCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_URSCR

/* adm-menu-userscreen-sql-oracle.xml - selectUserScreenList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.APKEY , A.USKEY , A.USNM , A.USPATH , A.USSCHDKEY , B.USSCHDNM , A.ISDWUS , A.NXPATH , A.URINFOYN , A.CMT , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY AS INSERTURNAME , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY AS UPDATEURNAME FROM TADMIN_MST_URSCR A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_USSC_HD B ON B.USSCHDKEY = A.USSCHDKEY
